news-global-econ.title: Fans Furious at Bruce Springsteen over Skyrocketing Ticket Prices for Anti-Trump 'No Kings' Tour
news-global-econ.description: Fans are becoming increasingly upset at Bruce Springsteen for the absurdly high ticket prices for his 2026 anti-Trump crusade concert tour.

news-global-econ.title: Pro-American Groups Welcome Trump's DHS Pick Markwayne Mullin
news-global-econ.description:
Pro-American lobby groups cautiously praised President Donald Trump's decision to pick Sen. Markwayne Mullin as the new Secretary of the Department of Homeland Security.

news-global-econ.title: Warner: Trump 'Has Not Made the Case' Iran Was Imminent Threat
news-global-econ.description:
On this week's broadcast of "Fox News Sunday," Sen. Mark Warner (D-VA) said President Donald Trump had not made the case for the military action in Iran.
The post Warner: Trump ‘Has Not Made the Case’ Iran Was Imminent Threat appeared first on Breitbart.

news-global-econ.title: Actor and former 'SNL' star slams major airline for his seat downgrade: ‘I paid for first class’
news-global-econ.description: An actor and comedian has alleged that American Airlines downgraded him from first class to economy on a red-eye flight, sparking controversy over airline practices.

news-global-econ.title: Marilyn Monroe's former Palm Springs hideaway hits the market for $3.3M
news-global-econ.description: Marilyn Monroe's former Palm Springs sanctuary hits the market for $3.3 million. The iconic 'Doll House' offers rare Hollywood history in Vista Las Palmas.

news-global-soc.title: Trump admin turns Venezuela into major US oil supplier as global shipping crisis eases
news-global-soc.description: Major policy shift sees Venezuela become key U.S. oil supplier under Trump administration, with new contracts signed for Gulf Coast refineries.

news-global-soc.title: 'Petty and Callous': Arizona's Democrat Governor Lambasted for Vetoing Charlie Kirk Memorial License Plate
news-global-soc.description:
Arizona Gov. Katie Hobbs (D) has vetoed a bill to create a specialty license plate honoring Turning Point USA Founder Charlie Kirk, who was brutally assassinated in September.

news-global-soc.title: The unlikely tool Trump is eyeing to tackle rising oil prices amid the Iran conflict
news-global-soc.description: War-risk insurance costs surge as conflict threatens oil shipments through Strait of Hormuz, potentially driving up gas prices for American consumers.

news-global-soc.title: Eileen Gu serves as grand marshal for Chinese New Year parade in San Francisco
news-global-soc.description: Controversial Olympic skier Eileen Gu was the grand marshal for the Chinese New Year festivities that took place in San Francisco on Saturday.
